name: Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc.
business: Greenwave Technology Solutions processes scrap metal from end-of-life vehicles, appliances, construction material, and industrial machinery into ferrous and nonferrous recycled metal products, and also sells recovered catalytic converters. It provides metal recycling and hauling services to large corporations, industrial manufacturers, retail customers, and government organizations.

exposures.sentence: We also process nonferrous metals such as aluminum, copper, stainless steel, nickel, brass, titanium, lead, alloys and mixed metal products.

catalysts.event: Second automotive shredder at Carrollton, Virginia expected to come online
catalysts.sentence: We operate an automotive shredder at our Kelford, North Carolina location and a second automotive shredder at our Carrollton, Virginia location is expected to come online in the second quarter of 2024.
